data.description:
## What
Replace every hardcoded `tickets` / `origin/tickets` branch literal in the git-invoking
code paths with `tickets_branch()` + `f"origin/{branch}"`.

Call sites:
- `src/rebar/_commands/init.py` (~272-295, 281): orphan branch + worktree creation, fetch, mount.
- `src/rebar/_store/sync.py` (read reconverge, ~83-153).
- `src/rebar/_store/push.py` (push refspec line 112, conflict merge ~124-165).
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_concurrency.py:56`.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_advisory_lock.py:498,533`.
- `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py:187` (rev-parse --verify).
- `src/rebar/_commands/fsck.py:227-236` (PUSH_PENDING vs origin/<branch>).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No remaining `"tickets"` / `"origin/tickets"` string literals in the listed git code paths.
- [ ] All listed call sites resolve the branch via `tickets_branch()`.
- [ ] Push/pull/fetch/reconcile/fsck work unchanged at the default branch name.

## Files
- `src/rebar/_commands/init.py`, `src/rebar/_store/sync.py`, `src/rebar/_store/push.py`
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/_concurrency.py`, `.../_advisory_lock.py`
- `src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py`, `src/rebar/_commands/fsck.py`

## Depends on
- Child 2 (`tickets_branch()` resolver must exist).
data.title: migrate branch call sites (init/sync/push/reconciler/fsck/reads) to tickets_branch()
